pet_notes: Original compact chibi pixel crab desktop pet named Clawd. Small rounded red-orange crab body, chunky claws, tiny legs, simple square expressive eyes, thick dark 1-2 px outline, limited warm palette, flat cel shading, readable silhouette. Always wear a blue detective cap in normal/common states, based on the supplied hat reference as inspiration only. Building/work-investigation behavior should use a small handheld magnifying glass inspired by the supplied magnifier reference instead of any hammer/anvil/building tool. Learn behavior semantics from clawd-on-desk: calm breathing idle, thoughtful review/inspection, fast typing/tool-work energy, mini crabwalk style scuttle, happy completion bounce, permission/notification alert posture, error deflation with attached smoke/tears, context cleanup sweeping rhythm, worktree carrying effort. Do not copy any clawd-on-desk artwork, SVG shapes, GIF frames, layout, exact proportions, text, logos, or character-specific asset details; create a new original crab in Codex digital pet style.
style_notes: Codex built-in digital pet style: pixel-art-adjacent sprite, compact chibi proportions, hard crisp outline, stepped pixel edges, flat colors, no shadows/glow/speed lines/text/UI. Preserve the blue hat across idle, waiting, running, waving, jumping, review, and failed unless pose hides a small part of it. The magnifying glass may appear in review/waiting/building-like poses and should be attached to a claw, not floating. Chroma-key background only in generated source images.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
